meaning: adv.哀婉动人的,可怜地,情绪上地
examples: "I THINK about it," he added pathetically, in a lower tone: "I think about it--all the time!"
Yet, the number of women equity partners in law firms is pathetically small.
Nintendo's Wii, on the other hand, was so pathetically underpowered that it couldn't even display high-definition graphics.
